LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Boons.Compat_BSSap: Start with sapient animals from Big and Small - Sapient Animals.
LanguageData.Playwright.Compat.BSSapientAnimals.ScenP:
Start with sapient animals from Big and Small - Sapient Animals.
Due to technical limitations, this animal will not appear in the colonist preparation screen, it will be added when the game starts.
LanguageData.Playwright.Compat.BSSapientAnimals.Scena: While the experiment worked, the results failed to gather any more meaningful data. You have been dumped onto a nearby rimworld along with your subjects. \n\nA researcher out of their depth, 4 sapient animals with no tools and limited opposable thumbs, but all of you share a strong will to live. Can you make it on such a hostile planet?
